queue.title: Pending triage

rejected.title: Rejected
rejected.confirmDelete: Permanently delete? The file will be erased from disk.
rejected.restoring: Restoring — returning to the triage queue

correctModal.label: Approve with correction

conflicts.title: Label conflicts
conflicts.description: The same file received different labels in separate curation rounds — choose the canonical one. The decision updates the classifier's training/validation data.
conflicts.newTaxonomyNotice: uses new taxonomy — accepting will propose creating it in the template
conflicts.createTitle: Create in the template and apply
conflicts.createIntroUsage_one: uses an entry that does not exist in the taxonomy. Creating it now updates the template
conflicts.createIntroUsage_other: uses entries that do not exist in the taxonomy. Creating them now updates the template
conflicts.createIntroAfter: and the profiles of all projects — the bootstrap classifier starts recognizing it immediately via aliases.
conflicts.aliasesLabel: Aliases (comma-separated) — what bootstrap uses to classify
conflicts.resolveFailed: Failed to apply the conflict resolution
